series_metadata.series_description: Documents Ohio Organized Crime Investigative Commission (OOCIC) use of confidential informants in the course of a task force investigation. Records include, but are not limited to, informant''s criminal history, background information, reports on types of activities, correspondence with OOCIC, and amount of payments.

retention_rules.trigger_desc: Electronic: from task force close. ; Paper: from task force close, unless scanned and saved electronically
